summoning
Echo of the Void Mace's Soul

Once in a while, deals physical damage equal to 80% of the unit's physical armor to 3 enemy units with the greatest current health. The unit also drains the targets of life force, and frightens them for 4 sec. When drained of life force, the enemy units deal 35% less damage and take 35% more damage. Besides, the ability's targets receive magic damage equal to 80% of their maximum health, and all their stats are reduced by 20% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
